```sql
set spark.driver.memory=40g;
-- set spark.driver.cores=3;
set spark.executor.memory=25G;
-- set spark.executor.cores=5;
-- set spark.vcore.boost.ratio=2;
set spark.sql.adaptive.minNumPostShufflePartitions=1000;
set spark.sql.adaptive.maxNumPostShufflePartitions=10000;
set spark.sql.adaptive.shuffle.targetPostShuffleInputSize= 256MB;
--shuffle 落地hdfs
set spark.shuffle.hdfs.enabled=true;
set spark.blacklist.enabled=true;
set spark.blacklist.application.fetchFailure.enabled=true;
set spark.shuffle.io.maxRetries=1;
set spark.shuffle.io.retryWait=0s;
set spark.shuffle.registration.timeout=30000;
set spark.shuffle.registration.maxAttempts=5;
set spark.network.timeout=500000;

set bytequery.sql.cartesian.product.check.enabled=false;


-- ====================================================================================================
-- 业务含义: 定义“抖店IM”触达明细日表的计算链路，用于评估触达后商家响应（回复/点击/已读）及图片/视频互动行为。
-- 代码逻辑: 构建行动点解析、触达消息聚合、行为流水标准化、卡片/报告点击展现聚合、图片/视频点击完播聚合五类CTE，最终按触达明细粒度输出响应标识、首响时间与点击展现计数，并写入分区date='20260628'。
-- ====================================================================================================
WITH

-- ====================================================================================================
-- 业务含义: 汇总触达消息明细，并计算触达后的商家回复/已读等响应信息；对IMSOP场景补充行动点信息用于分析“行动点→响应”的转化。
-- 代码逻辑: 以触达记录为主表，关联状态映射、行动点解析CTE、商家消息回复、bot消息回复、消息已读流水，产出触达粒度的首响时间与响应标识。
-- ====================================================================================================
t_msg_info AS (
    SELECT  a.reach_channel,
            a.intelligent_task_id,
            a.diagnose_task_id,
            a.plan_key,
            a.conversation_short_id,
            a.shop_id,
            a.reach_time,
            a.reach_date,
            a.reach_status,
            a.exp_reach_time,
            a.exp_reach_date,
            MAX(a.reach_status_name) AS reach_status_name,
            MAX(CASE WHEN reach_status = 1 AND b.send_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_reply,
            MIN(CASE WHEN reach_status = 1 THEN b.send_date END) AS first_reply_date,
            MIN(CASE WHEN reach_status = 1 THEN b.send_time END) AS first_reply_time,
            MAX(CASE WHEN reach_status = 1 AND d.read_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_read,
            MIN(CASE WHEN reach_status = 1 THEN d.read_date END) AS first_read_date,
            MIN(CASE WHEN reach_status = 1 THEN d.read_time END) AS first_read_time,
            MIN(a.operation_plan_id) AS operation_plan_id,
            MIN(a.biz_scene) AS biz_scene,
            a.msg_id,
            max(a.msg_content_text) AS msg_content_text,
            max(a.ai_strategy_id) AS ai_strategy_id,
            max(a.action_id) AS action_id,
            max(a.action_name) AS action_name,
            count(distinct case when reach_status = 1 AND datediff(b.send_date, a.reach_date)<=1 then b.msg_id end) as shop_send_msg_cnt_24h, -- 触达后24小时内，商家回复消息数
            count(distinct case when reach_status = 1 AND datediff(t_bot_send.send_date, a.reach_date)<=1 then t_bot_send.msg_id end) as bot_send_msg_cnt_24h -- 触达后24小时内，bot发送消息数
    FROM    (
                --预计触达对象
                SELECT  a1.reach_channel,
                        a1.intelligent_task_id,
                        a1.diagnose_task_id,
                        a3.plan_key,
                        a1.conversation_short_id,
                        a1.shop_id,
                        a1.reach_time,
                        a1.reach_date,
                        a1.reach_status,
                        a2.reach_status_name,
                        a1.operation_plan_id,
                        a1.biz_scene,
                        a1.create_time,
                        a1.create_date,
                        a1.msg_id,
                        a1.msg_content_text,
                        CASE WHEN s.strategy_id IS NOT NULL THEN a1.ai_strategy_id END AS ai_strategy_id,
                        a3.action_id,
                        a3.action_name,
                        a1.sender_user_id,
                        a1.exp_reach_time,
                        a1.exp_reach_date,
                        sum(case when reach_status=1 then 1 else 0 end) OVER (
                            PARTITION BY
                                    conversation_short_id,
                                    shop_id
                            ORDER BY
                                    UNIX_TIMESTAMP(reach_time)
                            RANGE   BETWEEN 0 FOLLOWING AND 86400 FOLLOWING
                        ) as bot_send_msg_cnt_24h -- 触达后24小时内，bot发送消息数
                FROM    (
                            SELECT  CASE WHEN source LIKE 'intelligent_sop.%' THEN '超级智能运营_抖店IMSOP'
                                         WHEN source LIKE 'report.max_date_%' THEN '经营周报_抖店IM'
                                         WHEN source LIKE 'diagnosis.start_date_%' THEN '智能诊断报告_抖店IM'
                                         WHEN source LIKE 'product_diagnose.%' THEN '整改风险诊断_抖店IM'
                                         WHEN source LIKE 'ai_strategy_touch.%' THEN 'AI自动化策略_抖店IM自定义话术'
                                    END AS reach_channel,
                                    split(source, '\\.')[1] AS intelligent_task_id, --触达任务ID/经营周报触达周期/智能诊断报告诊断周期/整改风险诊断触达周期
                                    CASE WHEN source LIKE 'intelligent_sop.%' THEN split(source, '\\.')[2] END AS diagnose_task_id, --诊断任务ID
                                    CASE WHEN source LIKE 'intelligent_sop.%' THEN split(source, '\\.')[3] END AS operation_plan_id, --智能运营计划ID
                                    conversation_short_id, --会话ID
                                    shop_id,
                                    from_unixtime(create_time) AS create_time,
                                    case when status = 1 then FROM_UNIXTIME(create_time) end AS reach_time,
                                    date_format(FROM_UNIXTIME(create_time), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS create_date,
                                    date_format(case when status = 1 then FROM_UNIXTIME(create_time) end, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS reach_date,
                                    status AS reach_status,
                                    get_json_object(json_split(content)[0], '$.text') AS msg_content_text,
                                    get_json_object(json_split(content)[0], '$.msg_id') AS msg_id, --发送成功的消息，会有消息id
                                    get_json_object(ext, '$.params.ai_strategy_id') AS ai_strategy_id,
                                    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY create_time DESC, CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC, status DESC) AS rn,
                                    get_json_object(ext, '$.biz_scene') AS biz_scene,
                                    sender_user_id,
                                    from_unixtime(create_time) as exp_reach_time,
                                    date_format(FROM_UNIXTIME(create_time), 'yyyy-MM-dd') as exp_reach_date
                            FROM    ecom.ods_mysql_ecom_scale_t_doudian_send_msg_record_di
                            WHERE   date <= '20260628'
                            AND     date >= '20260331'
                            AND     (
                                        source LIKE 'intelligent_sop.%' --智能SOP
                                        OR source LIKE 'report.max_date_%' --经营周报
                                        OR source LIKE 'diagnosis.start_date_%' --智能诊断报告
                                        OR source LIKE 'product_diagnose.%' --整改风险诊断
                                        OR source LIKE 'ai_strategy_touch.%' --AI自动化策略-抖店IM自定义话术
                                    )
                        ) a1
                LEFT OUTER JOIN
                        (
                            SELECT  status,
                                    code AS reach_status_name
                            FROM    ecom.ods_larksheet_msg_record_status_mapping_df
                            WHERE   date = '20260628'
                        ) a2
                ON      CAST(a1.reach_status AS STRING) = a2.status
                LEFT OUTER JOIN
                        (
                            SELECT  id AS diagnose_task_id,
                                    plan_key,
                                    get_json_object(solution, '$.action_point.action_id') AS action_id, --行动点id
                                    get_json_object(solution, '$.action_point.action_name') AS action_name --行动点名称
                            FROM    ecom.ods_mysql_doudian_ai_t_shop_diagnose_task_df
                            WHERE   date = max_pt('ecom.ods_mysql_doudian_ai_t_shop_diagnose_task_df')
                        ) a3
                ON      a1.diagnose_task_id = CAST(a3.diagnose_task_id AS STRING)
                LEFT OUTER JOIN
                        (
                            SELECT  CAST(id AS STRING) AS strategy_id
                            FROM    ecom.ods_mysql_operation_task_t_operator_channel_strategy_df
                            WHERE   date = '20260628'
                        ) s
                ON      a1.ai_strategy_id = s.strategy_id
                WHERE   a1.rn = 1
            ) a
    LEFT OUTER JOIN
            (
                --近90天群消息回复
                SELECT  DISTINCT conversation_short_id,
                        send_account_id AS shop_id,
                        send_time,
                        date_format(send_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS send_date,
                        msg_id
                FROM    ecom.dwd_sns_dousp_im_msg_send_di
                WHERE   date <= '20260628'
                AND     date >= '20260331'
                AND     sender_type = 0 --发送人:商家
                AND     conversation_type = 2 --群聊
            ) b
    ON      a.conversation_short_id = b.conversation_short_id
    AND     CAST(a.shop_id AS STRING) = b.shop_id
    AND     a.reach_time < b.send_time
    AND     datediff(b.send_date, a.reach_date) <= 3
        LEFT OUTER JOIN
            (
                --近90天群bot消息回复
                SELECT  DISTINCT conversation_short_id,
                        sender_id,
                        send_time,
                        date_format(send_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS send_date,
                        msg_id
                FROM    ecom.dwd_sns_dousp_im_msg_send_di
                WHERE   date <= '20260628'
                AND     date >= '20260331'
                AND     sender_type = 2--发送人:bot
                AND     conversation_type = 2 --群聊
            ) t_bot_send
    ON      a.conversation_short_id = t_bot_send.conversation_short_id
    -- AND     CAST(a.sender_user_id AS STRING) = cast(t_bot_send.sender_id AS STRING)
    AND     a.reach_time < t_bot_send.send_time
    AND     datediff(t_bot_send.send_date, a.reach_date) <= 1
    LEFT OUTER JOIN
            (
                --近90天群消息已读
                SELECT  conversation_short_id,
                        shop_id,
                        read_time,
                        date_format(read_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS read_date
                FROM    (
                            SELECT  conversation_short_id,
                                    user_id,
                                    MAX(FROM_UNIXTIME(read_index / 1000000)) AS read_time
                            FROM    ecom_effect.doudian_im_user_mark_read_dict
                            WHERE   date <= '20260628'
                            AND     date >= '20260331'
                            GROUP BY
                                    conversation_short_id,
                                    user_id,
                                    date
                        ) d1
                LEFT OUTER JOIN
                        (
                            SELECT  toutiao_id,
                                    shop_id
                            FROM    (
                                        SELECT  shop_id,
                                                toutiao_id,
                                                row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY toutiao_id ORDER BY create_time DESC) AS rno
                                        FROM    ecom.dim_sns_dousp_im_account_info_df
                                        WHERE   date = '20260628'
                                        AND     account_status_code = 2
                                        AND     account_type = 0
                                    ) a
                            WHERE   rno = 1
                        ) d2
                ON      d1.user_id = d2.toutiao_id
            ) d
    ON      a.shop_id = d.shop_id
    AND     a.conversation_short_id = d.conversation_short_id
    AND     a.reach_time < d.read_time
    AND     datediff(d.read_date, a.reach_date) <= 3
    GROUP BY
            a.reach_channel,
            a.intelligent_task_id,
            a.diagnose_task_id,
            a.plan_key,
            a.conversation_short_id,
            a.shop_id,
            a.reach_time,
            a.reach_date,
            a.reach_status,
            a.msg_id,
            a.exp_reach_time,
            a.exp_reach_date
),
-- ====================================================================================================
-- 业务含义: 标准化抖店IM相关的基础行为流水，用于后续统一口径识别卡片展现/点击与图片/视频点击完播。
-- 代码逻辑: 从TOB平台基础行为流水中筛选近90天merchant与PC端相关事件，统一shop_id与消息来源字段，产出is_show/is_clk/is_card_event/is_pic_vid_event等基础标识。
-- ====================================================================================================
t_flow_base as (
    SELECT  app_name,
            event,
            COALESCE(
                decode_shop_id,
                CAST(
                    CASE WHEN app_name = 'merchant' AND params ['decode_shop_id'] != '' THEN params ['decode_shop_id']
                        WHEN regexp_extract(params['source'], '(?:^|\\.)shop_id_(\\d+)', 1) <> '' THEN regexp_extract(params['source'], '(?:^|\\.)shop_id_(\\d+)', 1)
                        ELSE params ['shop_id']
                    END AS BIGINT
                )
            ) AS shop_id,
            get_json_object(params['hierarchical_dimension'], '$.doudian:deliver_source') AS deliver_source,
            params['source'] AS source,
            server_time,
            NVL(params['message_source'], '') AS msg_source,
            params['button_for'] AS button_for,
            -- 拆分message_source：按"."分割，生成数组（注：原SQL为":"，此处保持你的写法）
            SPLIT(NVL(params['message_source'], ''), '\\.') AS split_msg,
            CASE WHEN event IN ('growth_lynx_card_action_click', 'click_custom_card_btn') THEN 1
                ELSE 0
            END AS is_clk,
            CASE WHEN event IN ('growth_lynx_card_action_view', 'show_custom_card') THEN 1
                ELSE 0
            END AS is_show,
            CASE WHEN event IN (
                    'growth_lynx_card_action_click',
                    'click_custom_card_btn',
                    'show_custom_card',
                    'growth_lynx_card_action_view'
                ) THEN 1
                ELSE 0
            END AS is_card_event, 
            CASE WHEN event IN ( 
                    'click_button',
                    'video_complete',
                    'official_click_custom_card_btn',
                    'official_video_complete'
                ) THEN 1
                ELSE 0
            END AS is_pic_vid_event,
            params['message_id'] AS msg_id,
            params['action_code'] AS action_id
    FROM    ecom.dwd_flow_tob_platform_basic_di
    WHERE   date <= '20260628'
    AND     date >= '20260331'
    AND     app_name IN ('merchant', 'fe_growth_doudian_im')
    AND     (
                (
                    --推送卡片的展现\点击
                    event IN (
                        'growth_lynx_card_action_click',
                        'click_custom_card_btn',
                        'show_custom_card',
                        'growth_lynx_card_action_view'
                    )
                    AND (
                        (
                            params['source'] LIKE '%ch_doudian.smart_operator%' --超级智能运营
                            AND COALESCE(regexp_extract(params['source'], '(?:^|\\.)task_id_(\\d+)', 1), '') <> ''
                        ) --混排卡片
                        OR (
                            get_json_object(params['hierarchical_dimension'], '$.doudian:deliver_source') LIKE 'intelligent_sop.%'
                        ) --飞鸽通用卡片,飞鸽定制卡片
                    )
                )
                OR (
                    --推送图片或视频点击，非卡片相关时间
                    params['message_source'] LIKE '%intelligent_sop%' -- 消息来源包含智能SOP标识
                    AND (
                        -- 分支1：PC端（fe_growth_doudian_im）有效行为
                        (
                            app_name = 'fe_growth_doudian_im'
                            AND (
                                (
                                    event = 'click_button'
                                    AND params['button_for'] IN ('image_preview', 'video_preview')
                                ) -- PC端图片/视频点击
                                OR (event = 'video_complete') -- PC端视频完播
                            )
                        )
                        -- 分支2：APP端（merchant）有效行为
                        OR (
                            app_name = 'merchant'
                            AND params['page_type'] = 'doudian_im' -- 限定为抖店IM页面
                            AND (
                                (
                                    event = 'official_click_custom_card_btn'
                                    AND params['button_for'] IN ('image_preview', 'video_preview')
                                ) -- APP端图片/视频点击
                                OR (event = 'official_video_complete') -- APP端视频完播
                            )
                        )
                    )
                )
            )

),
-- ====================================================================================================
-- 业务含义: 计算触达后卡片/报告的点击与展现行为，用于衡量商家是否对触达内容产生互动。
-- 代码逻辑: 基于t_flow_base聚合超级智能运营卡片的首点/首展与点击/展现次数，并补充经营周报/智能诊断报告/整改风险诊断在飞鸽侧的点击展现聚合。
-- ====================================================================================================
t_msg_clk AS (
    --超级智能运营链接点击
    SELECT  shop_id,
            CASE WHEN event IN ('show_custom_card', 'click_custom_card_btn') THEN split(deliver_source, '\\.')[1]
                WHEN event IN ('growth_lynx_card_action_view', 'growth_lynx_card_action_click') THEN regexp_extract(source, '(?:^|\\.)task_id_(\\d+)', 1)
            END AS intelligent_task_id,
            CASE WHEN event IN ('show_custom_card', 'click_custom_card_btn') THEN split(deliver_source, '\\.')[2]
                WHEN event IN ('growth_lynx_card_action_view', 'growth_lynx_card_action_click') THEN split(regexp_extract(source, 'diagnose_task_id_\\d+', 0), '_')[3]
            END AS diagnose_task_id,
            '超级智能运营_抖店IMSOP' AS reach_channel,
            MIN(CASE WHEN is_clk=1 THEN date_format(server_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd') END) AS fst_clk_date,
            MIN(CASE WHEN is_clk=1 THEN server_time END) AS fst_clk_time,
            MIN(CASE WHEN is_show=1 THEN date_format(server_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd') END) AS fst_show_date,
            MIN(CASE WHEN is_show=1 THEN server_time END) AS fst_show_time,
            MIN(CASE WHEN app_name = 'merchant' AND is_clk=1 THEN date_format(server_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd') END) AS app_fst_clk_date,
            MIN(CASE WHEN app_name = 'fe_growth_doudian_im' AND is_clk=1 THEN date_format(server_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd') END) AS pc_fst_clk_date,
            MIN(CASE WHEN app_name = 'merchant' AND is_clk=1 THEN server_time END) AS app_fst_clk_time,
            MIN(CASE WHEN app_name = 'fe_growth_doudian_im' AND is_clk=1 THEN server_time END) AS pc_fst_clk_time,
            sum(is_clk) as clk_cnt,
            sum(is_show) as show_cnt
    FROM    t_flow_base
    where is_card_event = 1
    GROUP BY
            shop_id,
            CASE WHEN event IN ('show_custom_card', 'click_custom_card_btn') THEN split(deliver_source, '\\.')[1]
                WHEN event IN ('growth_lynx_card_action_view', 'growth_lynx_card_action_click') THEN regexp_extract(source, '(?:^|\\.)task_id_(\\d+)', 1)
            END,
            CASE WHEN event IN ('show_custom_card', 'click_custom_card_btn') THEN split(deliver_source, '\\.')[2]
                WHEN event IN ('growth_lynx_card_action_view', 'growth_lynx_card_action_click') THEN split(regexp_extract(source, 'diagnose_task_id_\\d+', 0), '_')[3]
            END
    UNION ALL
    --智能诊断报告、经营周报点击
    SELECT  decode_shop_id AS shop_id,
            split(deliver_source, '\\.')[1] AS intelligent_task_id,
            null as diagnose_task_id,
            CASE WHEN deliver_source LIKE '%report.max_date_%' THEN '经营周报_抖店IM'
                 WHEN deliver_source LIKE '%diagnosis.start_date_%' THEN '智能诊断报告_抖店IM'
                 WHEN deliver_source LIKE '%product_diagnose.date_%' THEN '整改风险诊断_抖店IM'
            END AS reach_channel,
            MIN(date_format(server_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS fst_clk_date,
            MIN(server_time) AS fst_clk_time,
            MIN(date_format(server_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS fst_show_date,
            MIN(server_time) AS fst_show_time,
            NULL AS app_fst_clk_date,
            NULL AS pc_fst_clk_date,
            NULL AS app_fst_clk_time,
            NULL AS pc_fst_clk_time,
            sum(1) as clk_cnt,
            sum(1) as show_cnt
    FROM    ecom.dm_slr_growth_reach_dousp_im_click_show_flow_di
    WHERE   date <= '20260628'
    AND     date >= '20260331'
    AND     type = '飞鸽'
    AND     card_type = 'doudian_im_group_key_information'
    AND     decode_shop_id IS NOT NULL
    AND     (
                deliver_source LIKE '%diagnosis.start_date_%' --智能诊断报告
                OR deliver_source LIKE '%report.max_date_%' --经营周报
                OR deliver_source LIKE '%product_diagnose.date_%' --整改风险诊断
            )
    GROUP BY
            decode_shop_id,
            split(deliver_source, '\\.')[1],
            CASE WHEN deliver_source LIKE '%report.max_date_%' THEN '经营周报_抖店IM'
                 WHEN deliver_source LIKE '%diagnosis.start_date_%' THEN '智能诊断报告_抖店IM'
                 WHEN deliver_source LIKE '%product_diagnose.date_%' THEN '整改风险诊断_抖店IM'
            END
),
-- ====================================================================================================
-- 业务含义: 计算智能SOP触达消息对应的图片/视频互动行为（点击与完播），补充触达后的深度互动指标。
-- 代码逻辑: 基于t_flow_base筛选图片/视频相关事件，将PC端与APP端原始事件标准化后按店铺+任务维度聚合，输出APP/PC端图片点击、视频点击与完播标识。
-- ====================================================================================================
t_pic_vid_clk as (
    SELECT  shop_id, -- 标准化后的店铺ID
            touch_task_id, -- 拆分自message_source的触达任务ID
            dignose_task_id, -- 拆分自message_source的诊断任务ID
            plan_key, -- 拆分自message_source的计划KEY
            -- PC端图片点击是否发生：fe_growth_doudian_im端+图片点击事件，有则1，无则0
            MAX(
                CASE WHEN event_type = 'click_picture' AND app_name = 'fe_growth_doudian_im' THEN 1
                    ELSE 0
                END
            ) AS is_pc_clk_pic,
            -- PC端视频点击是否发生：fe_growth_doudian_im端+视频点击事件，有则1，无则0
            MAX(
                CASE WHEN event_type = 'click_video' AND app_name = 'fe_growth_doudian_im' THEN 1
                    ELSE 0
                END
            ) AS is_pc_clk_vid,
            -- PC端视频完播是否发生：fe_growth_doudian_im端+视频完播事件，有则1，无则0
            MAX(
                CASE WHEN event_type = 'complete_video' AND app_name = 'fe_growth_doudian_im' THEN 1
                    ELSE 0
                END
            ) AS is_pc_com_vid,
            -- APP端图片点击是否发生：merchant端+图片点击事件，有则1，无则0
            MAX(
                CASE WHEN event_type = 'click_picture' AND app_name = 'merchant' THEN 1
                    ELSE 0
                END
            ) AS is_app_clk_pic,
            -- APP端视频点击是否发生：merchant端+视频点击事件，有则1，无则0
            MAX(
                CASE WHEN event_type = 'click_video' AND app_name = 'merchant' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
            ) AS is_app_clk_vid,
            -- APP端视频完播是否发生：merchant端+视频完播事件，有则1，无则0
            MAX(
                CASE WHEN event_type = 'complete_video' AND app_name = 'merchant' THEN 1
                    ELSE 0
                END
            ) AS is_app_com_vid
    FROM    (
                -- 子查询1：数据筛选+事件类型标准化
                SELECT  app_name, -- 应用名称（PC端：fe_growth_doudian_im；APP端：merchant）
                        shop_id,
                        msg_source AS message_source, -- 统一空值后的消息来源字段
                        split_msg[1] AS touch_task_id, -- 拆分后的触达任务ID
                        split_msg[2] AS dignose_task_id, -- 拆分后的诊断任务ID
                        split_msg[3] AS plan_key, -- 拆分后的计划KEY
                        -- 事件类型标准化：将不同端的原始事件映射为统一类型
                        CASE WHEN event IN ('official_click_custom_card_btn', 'click_button') AND button_for = 'image_preview' THEN 'click_picture' -- 图片点击
                            WHEN event IN ('official_click_custom_card_btn', 'click_button') AND button_for = 'video_preview' THEN 'click_video' -- 视频点击
                            WHEN event IN ('video_complete', 'official_video_complete') THEN 'complete_video' -- 视频完播
                        END AS event_type
                FROM    t_flow_base -- 数据源表：TOB平台基础行为流水表
                WHERE   is_pic_vid_event = 1
            ) t
            -- 分组维度：按店铺+任务维度聚合，判断各行为是否发生
    GROUP BY
            shop_id,
            touch_task_id,
            dignose_task_id,
            plan_key
),
-- ====================================================================================================
-- 业务含义: 产出诊断任务(diagnose_task_id)在不同方案(plan_key)下可执行的行动点id列表，用于后续运营/触达链路消费。
-- 代码逻辑: 分别抽取 solution 内单行动点action_id与 extra 中多行动点action_points 并聚合为数组；再按 diagnose_task_id、plan_key 做并集去重合并并输出。
-- ====================================================================================================
t_diagnose_task_action_base AS (
    SELECT  diagnose_task_id,
            plan_key,
            CASE
                WHEN solution_action_id IS NULL THEN extra_action_id
                WHEN extra_action_id IS NULL THEN solution_action_id
                ELSE array_union(solution_action_id, extra_action_id)
            END AS action_id
    FROM    (
                SELECT  COALESCE(t_solution.diagnose_task_id, t_extra.diagnose_task_id) AS diagnose_task_id,
                        COALESCE(t_solution.plan_key, t_extra.plan_key) AS plan_key,
                        t_solution.solution_action_id,
                        t_extra.extra_action_id
                FROM    (
                            SELECT  CAST(id AS STRING) AS diagnose_task_id,
                                    plan_key,
                                    collect_set(get_json_object(solution, '$.action_point.action_id')) AS solution_action_id
                            FROM    ecom.ods_mysql_doudian_ai_t_shop_diagnose_task_df
                            WHERE   date = max_pt('ecom.ods_mysql_doudian_ai_t_shop_diagnose_task_df')
                            AND     COALESCE(get_json_object(solution, '$.action_point.action_id'), '') NOT IN ('', 'null')
                            GROUP BY
                                    id,
                                    plan_key
                        ) t_solution
                FULL OUTER JOIN
                        (
                            SELECT  CAST(id AS STRING) AS diagnose_task_id,
                                    plan_key,
                                    from_json(
                                        get_json_object(
                                            get_json_object(extra, '$.diagnose_extra'),
                                            '$.action_points'
                                        ),
                                        'array<string>'
                                    ) AS extra_action_id
                            FROM    ecom.ods_mysql_doudian_ai_t_shop_diagnose_task_df
                            WHERE   date = max_pt('ecom.ods_mysql_doudian_ai_t_shop_diagnose_task_df')
                            AND     COALESCE(
                                        get_json_object(
                                            get_json_object(extra, '$.diagnose_extra'),
                                            '$.action_points'
                                        ),
                                        ''
                                    ) NOT IN ('', 'null')
                        ) t_extra
                ON      t_solution.diagnose_task_id = t_extra.diagnose_task_id
                AND     t_solution.plan_key = t_extra.plan_key
            ) t_union
),
-- ====================================================================================================
-- 业务含义: 产出“新版卡片行动点”在前端埋点中的点击/曝光明细，用于行动点层面的点击曝光效果分析。
-- 代码逻辑: 基于t_flow_base抽取埋点中携带的msg_id与action_id字段，按msg_id+action_id+shop_id聚合计算首点击/首曝光时间、点击/曝光次数与是否曝光标识。
-- ====================================================================================================
t_msg_action_clk AS (
    SELECT  msg_id,
            action_id,
            shop_id,
            MIN(CASE WHEN is_clk = 1 THEN server_time END) AS fst_clk_time,
            MIN(CASE WHEN is_show = 1 THEN server_time END) AS fst_show_time,
            sum(is_clk) as clk_cnt,
            sum(is_show) as show_cnt,
            max(is_show) as is_show
    FROM    t_flow_base
    WHERE   is_card_event = 1
    AND     COALESCE(msg_id, '') NOT IN ('', 'null')
    AND     COALESCE(action_id, '') NOT IN ('', 'null')
    GROUP BY
            msg_id,
            action_id,
            shop_id
),
-- ====================================================================================================
-- 业务含义: 并行产出行动点层面的发布/曝光/点击效果明细，用于回填触达明细中的action_json并支撑行动点转化分析。
-- 代码逻辑: 以t_msg_info触达明细为主键关联t_diagnose_task_action_base展开行动点列表，再与t_msg_action_clk按msg_id+shop_id+action_id匹配，限定触达后3天窗口计算曝光/点击，最终按diagnose_task_id+plan_key+shop_id粒度聚合输出action_json数组。
-- ====================================================================================================
t_msg_action_parallel AS (
    SELECT  diagnose_task_id,
            plan_key,
            shop_id,
            collect_set(
                named_struct(
                    'action_id',
                    action_id,
                    'is_action_show',
                    is_action_show,
                    'is_action_clk',
                    is_action_clk
                )
            ) AS action_json
            ,intelligent_task_id
    FROM    (
                SELECT  t.diagnose_task_id AS diagnose_task_id,
                        t.plan_key AS plan_key,
                        t.intelligent_task_id AS intelligent_task_id,
                        CAST(t.shop_id AS STRING) AS shop_id,
                        t.action_id,
                        MAX(
                            CASE
                                WHEN t.reach_status = 1
                                     AND t.reach_time < c.fst_show_time
                                     AND datediff(date_format(c.fst_show_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), t.reach_date) <= 3
                                     AND c.fst_show_time IS NOT NULL THEN 1
                                ELSE 0
                            END
                        ) AS is_action_show,
                        MAX(
                            CASE
                                WHEN t.reach_status = 1
                                     AND t.reach_time < c.fst_clk_time
                                     AND datediff(date_format(c.fst_clk_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), t.reach_date) <= 3
                                     AND c.fst_clk_time IS NOT NULL THEN 1
                                ELSE 0
                            END
                        ) AS is_action_clk
                FROM    (
                            SELECT  t.diagnose_task_id,
                                    t.plan_key,
                                    t.shop_id,
                                    t.reach_time,
                                    t.reach_date,
                                    t.reach_status,
                                    t.intelligent_task_id,
                                    action_id_exploded AS action_id
                            FROM    t_msg_info t
                            LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                    t_diagnose_task_action_base b
                            ON      t.diagnose_task_id = b.diagnose_task_id
                            AND     t.plan_key = b.plan_key
                            LATERAL VIEW OUTER explode(b.action_id) action_id_table AS action_id_exploded
                            WHERE   COALESCE(action_id_exploded, '') <> ''
                        ) t
                LEFT OUTER JOIN
                        t_msg_action_clk c
                ON      concat('intelligent_sop.', t.intelligent_task_id, '.', t.diagnose_task_id, '.', t.plan_key) = c.msg_id
                AND     CAST(t.shop_id AS STRING) = CAST(c.shop_id AS STRING)
                AND     t.action_id = c.action_id
                GROUP BY
                        t.diagnose_task_id,
                        t.plan_key,
                        CAST(t.shop_id AS STRING),
                        t.action_id,
                        t.intelligent_task_id
            ) s
    GROUP BY
            diagnose_task_id,
            plan_key,
            shop_id,
            intelligent_task_id
)
-- ====================================================================================================
-- 业务含义: 写入“抖店IM”触达明细日表分区，产出触达后响应与互动指标明细。
-- 代码逻辑: 依次构建t_msg_info(触达聚合与响应口径)、t_flow_base(埋点标准化)、t_msg_clk(卡片/报告点击展现)、t_msg_action_clk(行动点点击曝光)、t_pic_vid_clk(图片/视频互动)、t_diagnose_task_action_base(行动点解析去重与数组聚合)、t_msg_action_parallel(并行产出action_json回填)，最终INSERT OVERWRITE写入date='20260628'分区。
-- ====================================================================================================
INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE ecom.dm_slr_growth_reach_dousp_im_intelligent_sop_detail_df PARTITION (date = '20260628')
SELECT  reach_channel,
        m.intelligent_task_id AS intelligent_task_id,
        conversation_short_id,
        m.shop_id AS shop_id,
        exp_reach_time AS exp_reach_time,
        exp_reach_date AS exp_reach_date,
        reach_time,
        reach_date,
        reach_status,
        CASE WHEN reach_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_reach_success,
        CASE WHEN reach_status <> 1 THEN reach_status_name END AS fail_reason,
        COALESCE(is_reply, 0) AS is_reply,
        COALESCE(is_clk, 0) AS is_clk,
        COALESCE(is_read, 0) AS is_read,
        CASE WHEN is_reply = 1 OR is_clk = 1 OR is_read = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_response,
        first_reply_date,
        first_clk_date,
        first_read_date,
        first_reply_time,
        first_clk_time,
        first_read_time,
        m.diagnose_task_id AS diagnose_task_id,
        m.plan_key AS plan_key,
        operation_plan_id,
        CASE WHEN datediff(first_reply_date, reach_date) <= 1 OR (datediff(first_clk_date, reach_date) <= 1 AND datediff(first_clk_date, reach_date) >= 0)
                  OR (datediff(first_read_date, reach_date) <= 1 AND datediff(first_read_date, reach_date) <= 1)
                  THEN 1
             ELSE 0
        END AS is_response_1d,
        biz_scene,
        if(datediff(first_reply_date, reach_date) <= 1, 1, 0) AS is_reply_1d,
        if(datediff(first_clk_date, reach_date) <= 1 AND datediff(first_clk_date, reach_date) >= 0, 1, 0) AS is_clk_1d,
        if(datediff(first_read_date, reach_date) <= 1 AND datediff(first_read_date, reach_date) >= 0, 1, 0) AS is_read_1d,
        msg_id,
        msg_content_text,
        is_app_clk,
        app_first_clk_date,
        app_first_clk_time,
        is_pc_clk,
        pc_first_clk_date,
        pc_first_clk_time,
        action_id,
        action_name,
        clk_cnt,
        show_cnt,
        is_show,
        is_deep_response_1d,
        is_app_clk_pic, --是否app端点击图片
        is_app_clk_vid, --是否app端点击视频
        is_app_com_vid, --是否app端完播视频
        is_pc_clk_pic, --是否app端点击图片
        is_pc_clk_vid, --是否app端点击视频
        is_pc_com_vid, --是否app端完播视频
        t_action.action_json AS action_json,
        ai_strategy_id
FROM    (
            SELECT  a.reach_channel,
                    a.intelligent_task_id,
                    a.diagnose_task_id,
                    a.plan_key,
                    a.conversation_short_id,
                    a.shop_id,
                    a.reach_time,
                    a.reach_date,
                    a.reach_status,
                    a.exp_reach_time,
                    a.exp_reach_date,
                    MAX(a.reach_status_name) AS reach_status_name,
                    MAX(a.is_reply) AS is_reply,
                    MIN(a.first_reply_date) AS first_reply_date,
                    MIN(a.first_reply_time) AS first_reply_time,
                    MAX(CASE WHEN reach_status = 1 and a.reach_time < c.fst_clk_time AND datediff(c.fst_clk_date, a.reach_date) <= 3 AND c.fst_clk_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_clk,
                    MIN(CASE WHEN reach_status = 1 and a.reach_time < c.fst_clk_time AND datediff(c.fst_clk_date, a.reach_date) <= 3 THEN c.fst_clk_date END) AS first_clk_date,
                    MIN(CASE WHEN reach_status = 1 and a.reach_time < c.fst_clk_time AND datediff(c.fst_clk_date, a.reach_date) <= 3 THEN c.fst_clk_time END) AS first_clk_time,
                    MAX(a.is_read) AS is_read,
                    MIN(a.first_read_date) AS first_read_date,
                    MIN(a.first_read_time) AS first_read_time,
                    MIN(a.operation_plan_id) AS operation_plan_id,
                    MIN(a.biz_scene) AS biz_scene,
                    a.msg_id,
                    max(a.msg_content_text) AS msg_content_text,
                    max(a.ai_strategy_id) AS ai_strategy_id,
                    MAX(CASE WHEN reach_status = 1 and a.reach_time < c.fst_clk_time AND datediff(c.fst_clk_date, a.reach_date) <= 3 AND c.app_fst_clk_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_app_clk,
                    MIN(CASE WHEN reach_status = 1 and a.reach_time < c.fst_clk_time AND datediff(c.fst_clk_date, a.reach_date) <= 3 THEN c.app_fst_clk_date END) AS app_first_clk_date,
                    MIN(CASE WHEN reach_status = 1 and a.reach_time < c.fst_clk_time AND datediff(c.fst_clk_date, a.reach_date) <= 3 THEN c.app_fst_clk_time END) AS app_first_clk_time,
                    MAX(CASE WHEN reach_status = 1 and a.reach_time < c.fst_clk_time AND datediff(c.fst_clk_date, a.reach_date) <= 3 AND c.pc_fst_clk_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_pc_clk,
                    MIN(CASE WHEN reach_status = 1 and a.reach_time < c.fst_clk_time AND datediff(c.fst_clk_date, a.reach_date) <= 3 THEN c.pc_fst_clk_date END) AS pc_first_clk_date,
                    MIN(CASE WHEN reach_status = 1 and a.reach_time < c.fst_clk_time AND datediff(c.fst_clk_date, a.reach_date) <= 3 THEN c.pc_fst_clk_time END) AS pc_first_clk_time,
                    max(a.action_id) AS action_id,
                    max(a.action_name) AS action_name,
                    sum(CASE WHEN reach_status = 1 and a.reach_time < c.fst_clk_time AND datediff(c.fst_clk_date, a.reach_date) <= 3 then c.clk_cnt else 0 end) as clk_cnt,
                    sum(case when reach_status = 1 and a.reach_time < c.fst_show_time AND datediff(c.fst_show_date, a.reach_date) <= 3 then c.show_cnt else 0 end) as show_cnt,
                    max(case when reach_status = 1 and a.reach_time < c.fst_show_time AND datediff(c.fst_show_date, a.reach_date) <= 3 and c.show_cnt>0 then 1 else 0 end) as is_show,
                    max(case when shop_send_msg_cnt_24h>=3 and bot_send_msg_cnt_24h>=3 then 1 else 0 end) as is_deep_response_1d, -- 是否24小时深度响应（24h内至少3次触达和3次回复）
                    MAX(t_pic_vid_clk.is_app_clk_pic) AS is_app_clk_pic, --是否app端点击图片
                    MAX(t_pic_vid_clk.is_app_clk_vid) AS is_app_clk_vid, --是否app端点击视频
                    MAX(t_pic_vid_clk.is_app_com_vid) AS is_app_com_vid, --是否app端完播视频
                    MAX(t_pic_vid_clk.is_pc_clk_pic) AS is_pc_clk_pic, --是否app端点击图片
                    MAX(t_pic_vid_clk.is_pc_clk_vid) AS is_pc_clk_vid, --是否app端点击视频
                    MAX(t_pic_vid_clk.is_pc_com_vid) AS is_pc_com_vid --是否app端完播视频
            FROM    t_msg_info a
            LEFT OUTER JOIN
                    t_msg_clk c
            ON      (
                        a.reach_channel = '超级智能运营_抖店IMSOP'
                        AND CAST(a.shop_id AS STRING) = c.shop_id
                        AND a.intelligent_task_id = c.intelligent_task_id
                        AND a.reach_channel = c.reach_channel
                        AND a.diagnose_task_id = c.diagnose_task_id
                    )
            OR      (
                        a.reach_channel <> '超级智能运营_抖店IMSOP'
                        AND CAST(a.shop_id AS STRING) = c.shop_id
                        AND a.intelligent_task_id = c.intelligent_task_id
                        AND a.reach_channel = c.reach_channel
                    )
            LEFT JOIN
                    t_pic_vid_clk
            ON      (
                        a.reach_channel = '超级智能运营_抖店IMSOP'
                        AND CAST(a.shop_id AS STRING) = CAST(t_pic_vid_clk.shop_id AS STRING)
                        AND a.intelligent_task_id = t_pic_vid_clk.touch_task_id
                        AND a.diagnose_task_id = t_pic_vid_clk.dignose_task_id
                        AND a.plan_key = t_pic_vid_clk.plan_key
                    )
            GROUP BY
                    a.reach_channel,
                    a.intelligent_task_id,
                    a.diagnose_task_id,
                    a.plan_key,
                    a.conversation_short_id,
                    a.shop_id,
                    a.reach_time,
                    a.reach_date,
                    a.reach_status,
                    a.msg_id,
                    a.exp_reach_time,
                    a.exp_reach_date
        ) m
LEFT OUTER JOIN
        t_msg_action_parallel t_action
ON      m.diagnose_task_id = t_action.diagnose_task_id
AND     m.plan_key = t_action.plan_key
AND     CAST(m.shop_id AS STRING) = CAST(t_action.shop_id AS STRING)
and     m.intelligent_task_id = t_action.intelligent_task_id

```

  根因: Stage 27为读取ods_mysql_doudian_ai_t_shop_diagnose_task_df表的源头Stage，扫描数据量达802.7GiB仅分配30个task处理，并行度严重不足，单task负载过高导致整体耗时占总查询的58.2%

### 所有可参考的优化建议
#### P2: 缓存复用t_flow_base+开启Hudi谓词下推降低扫描开销
类别: Hint 注入

```
set hudi.record.level.filter.enabled=true;
```
